meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to build high-impact user onboarding to overcome a lack of portfolio. An Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: To overcome a portfolio void, build high-impact user onboarding flows that demonstrate product-led growth expertise. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you turn a simple onboarding feature into a sophisticated, repeatable case study that proves your value to high-ticket clients immediately.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a portfolio is the silent assassin of freelance careers. You have the technical chops, but without a body of work, you are just another voice in the noise. Clients don't buy code; they buy the transformation from 'confused visitor' to 'power user.'

User onboarding is your secret weapon. It is the most visible, high-stakes part of any application. By mastering the art of the first-run experience, you stop being a developer who writes functions and start being a consultant who engineers retention. Let’s build a portfolio-worthy asset that converts.

steps.title: Define the User Journey Map
steps.description: Map out the 'Aha!' moment. Identify the three critical actions a user must take to realize the value of the product.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the core value proposition of a SaaS project and generate a 3-step onboarding flow JSON schema that prioritizes user activation over data collection.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate a React component for a 3-step onboarding stepper with progress tracking.'

steps.title: Build the Interactive Walkthrough
steps.description: Create a non-intrusive, context-aware interface that guides users through the app's primary features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an interactive tour overlay component using Framer Motion that highlights dashboard elements sequentially.

steps.title: Implement Intelligent State Management
steps.description: Ensure the onboarding state persists across sessions so users don't get trapped in a loop.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a React context provider for onboarding state that syncs with local storage and handles user completion flags.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Refactor the current onboarding hook to use persistent storage with a fallback to user database profile fields.'

steps.title: Integrate Analytics Hooks
steps.description: Track drop-off points to prove to clients that your onboarding is data-driven, not just aesthetic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a tracking utility that fires events for 'onboarding_step_completed' and 'onboarding_abandoned' to Segment or PostHog.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Add analytics event emitters to the onboarding stepper component.'

steps.title: Documentation & Case Study Wrapper
steps.description: Package the code into a professional repository with a README that explains the business logic behind the onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a professional case study README for this onboarding module, highlighting the conversion-focused design choices.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit 'feat: add conversion-focused onboarding module with analytics'

pro_tips: Always use a 'skip' button; forced onboarding is a conversion killer that frustrates power users.
Show, don't tell: Use skeleton screens during onboarding to make the app feel faster than it is.
Implement 'progressive disclosure': Only ask for complex permissions once the user has experienced the core value.
Use micro-animations to celebrate completion of the onboarding steps; it increases dopamine and retention.
Include a 'reset onboarding' link in the user settings; it serves as a fail-safe and testing tool for your clients.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a live staging environment, record a 60-second Loom video walking through the logic, and add it to your LinkedIn Featured section as a 'Product Onboarding Case Study'.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect project to fall into your lap. Create the work that attracts the clients you actually want. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
